title: Xerisimo Pao de Queijo
description: A classic Brazilian cheese bread recipe with a twist using xerisimo flour.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together xerisimo flour and fix de pao.
Gradually add spring water, stirring with a fork until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough on a floured surface and shape into balls.
Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with grated queijo.
Return to oven for an additional 2-3 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
